## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No tokens, real portal configs, customer data, or private notes are included.
- [ ] Mutations remain guarded by `--yes`.
- [ ] `--show-request` works for new or changed commands.
- [ ] Scope, tier, and 403 ambiguity notes are updated where relevant.
- [ ] Tests cover path/body/query mapping or the reason is documented.
